# PERF-026 positive: base64.EncodeToString inside a loop body
lang: go
file: PERF-026-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/base64"
)

func EncodeAll(values [][]byte) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, v := range values {
		out = append(out, base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(v))
	}
	return out
}
